shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch sitting at a minimal writing desk, surrounded by unused tools set aside, representing Bear's philosophy of deliberate omission.
assets.caption: Bear Notes — the design philosophy of doing less, better.
assets.prompt: Bear Notes | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting at a minimal writing desk with a single open notebook, surrounded by shelves of unused tools and features that have been neatly set aside. The composition conveys focus through deliberate omission. Cap tilted, serene expression. Cream background. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing between a cluttered productivity app and a minimal Bear-style writing surface.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing between a cluttered productivity app and a minimal Bear-style writing surface.
assets.prompt: Bear Notes | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing at two contrasting interfaces side by side: on the left, a cluttered app with sidebars, toolbars, integration icons, and notifications; on the right, a clean white writing surface with a single line of text and a blinking cursor. The contrast is the point. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
